parameters.content:
## Workflow 9: Daily Intake Sheet Creator

**Trigger:** Every day at 7:00 AM

**What it does:**
1. Generates today's date and sheet title
2. Creates a new Google Spreadsheet in the configured Drive folder
3. Adds headers, dropdowns, conditional formatting, and column protection via Sheets API batchUpdate
4. Saves the spreadsheet ID to Supabase `daily_intake_sheets` table
5. Sends an email to the clinic with the sheet link (via Gmail)
6. Logs creation event to Supabase `system_logs`

**Before activating:**
1. Set credential on HTTP Drive nodes → `googleDriveOAuth2Api`
2. Set credential on HTTP Sheets node → `googleSheetsOAuth2Api`
3. Set credential on Gmail node → `gmailOAuth2Api`
4. Set credential on Postgres nodes → `Supabase DB`
5. Fill in `.env`: `GOOGLE_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID`, `CLINIC_EMAIL`, `CLINIC_HOSPITAL_NAMES`, `CLINIC_DOCTOR_NAMES`

**Note:** The Google OAuth2 credential used for Drive/Sheets API must have scopes:
`https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets`
`https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive`
Create one credential with both scopes in n8n Credentials → Google OAuth2 API.

value.spreadsheet_url: ={{ $('Create Spreadsheet in Drive').item.json.webViewLink || 'https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/' + $('Create Spreadsheet in Drive').item.json.id }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '📋 Patient Intake Sheet Ready — ' + $('Build Sheet Config').item.json.displayDate }}
parameters.message:
=

Patient Intake Sheet — {{ $('Build Sheet Config').item.json.displayDate }}

Good morning! Your daily patient intake sheet is ready. Please click the link below to open it and start entering today's patient records.

Today's Sheet:

{{ $('Build Sheet Config').item.json.sheetTitle }}

How to fill the sheet:

  1. Fill columns B to J for each patient (hospital, doctor, name, DOB, sex, phone, visit date, follow-up)
  2. Leave columns A, K, L, M blank — they are auto-filled by the system
  3. Phone number: 10 digits only, no spaces or dashes (e.g. 9876543210)
  4. Follow-up date: Only fill if Follow-Up Required = Yes
  5. Data syncs to the patient database every 10 minutes automatically

Patient Retention Engine — Automated by n8n

value.message: Daily intake sheet created and emailed
value.details: ={{ JSON.stringify({ date: $('Build Sheet Config').item.json.dateStr, spreadsheet_id: $('Create Spreadsheet in Drive').item.json.id, spreadsheet_url: $('Create Spreadsheet in Drive').item.json.webViewLink || '', email_sent_to: $('Build Sheet Config').item.json.clinicEmail, title: $('Build Sheet Config').item.json.sheetTitle }) }}

value.message: Failed to create daily intake sheet in Google Drive
value.details: ={{ JSON.stringify({ date: $('Build Sheet Config').item.json.dateStr, error: $json.error?.message || $json.message || 'Google Drive API error', raw: JSON.stringify($json).substr(0, 500) }) }}

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value: =⚠️ *WF9 Alert* — Failed to create daily intake sheet for {{ $('Build Sheet Config').item.json.dateStr }}. Please check n8n execution logs. Staff will not receive a sheet link today.
